ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Continued To Sep-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Codi M. Dada for and with Melissa Perez, Administrator (via Zoom).
Ryan A. Henderson for Kevin Montgomery, Lucinda Montgomery, and Dawn Gregory (via Zoom).

Mr. Dada explained that petitioner is not bondable, and that arrangements were made to open a blocked account at U.S. Bank. The bonding company has agreed to issue a bond on the condition that the full inventory amount-$323,030-is deposited into the blocked account. Mr. Dada reported that $311,257.63 has already been deposited, with the remaining $11,773 spent on property taxes and repairs. He requested that the Court approve the reduced deposit amount.

The Court suggested that Mr. Dada file an ex parte request for approval of the blocked account, along with a declaration from petitioner explaining the expenses and providing supporting documentation.

Mr. Dada further reported that the estate's real property is in contract for sale at $1.4 million, and that closing was pending consent from Mr. Henderson's clients to the Notice of Proposed Action. Mr. Dada confirmed that title instructions direct proceeds to the blocked account, and he will file the ex parte request promptly. The Court encouraged both sides to continue communicating to resolve the matter.

Following discussion, the Court continued the Petition to Approve Report of Status of Administration to September 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause were taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Ryan Henderson, Esq., for Kevin Montgomery, Lucinda Montgomery, and Dawn Gregory, Petitioners.

Codi M. Dada Esq., for Melissa Marie Perez, Administrator.

At the outset, the court and Mr. Dada discuss the distinct Notice and Bond issues. Mr. Dada offers an update on the preceding issues. The court admonishes and reminds Mr. Dada that there has not been an ex parte application filed to increase the bond in accordance with the order increasing bond endorsed by the court on May-16-2025, and in compliance with probate code 7.204. After additional discussion, Mr. Dada offers an update regarding the Estate's Real Property and additional status of the Estate.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jul-09-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Melissa Marie Perez to appear on Jul-09-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. to explain the failure to obtain and file the increased bond.

An Order to Show Cause as to why the court should not suspend Melissa Marie Perez as Administrator of the Estate for failure to obtain and file the increased bond is set for Jul-09-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Notice of the next hearing shall be provided by the court to the surety company, Fidelity and Deposit Company of Maryland.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Henderson for Kevin Montgomery, Lucinda Montgomery, and Dawn Gregory, Petitioners (via Zoom).
Codi M. Dada for Melissa Marie Perez, Administrator (via Zoom).

The Court inquired whether any objections had been raised to the petition. Counsel reported that no objections had been raised. There being no objections, the court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

The court advised Mr. Dada that prior to the next hearing on May 6, 2025, either waivers of bond must be filed by the additional heirs or an ex parte application to increase the bond must be submitted.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
